title: US Leveraged Loans Lose the Most Since 2022 on AI-Driven Fears
description: A basket of outstanding US corporate loans suffered its steepest monthly decline in more than three years as fears of artificial-intelligence disruption deepened, sparking a selloff.
content: A basket of outstanding US corporate loans suffered its steepest monthly decline in more than three years as fears of artificial-intelligence disruption deepened, sparking a selloff.
